hooks.command: FILE=$(cat | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.java$'; then cd /home/atomik/src/Ground-Control/backend && ./gradlew spotlessApply -q 2>/dev/null; fi

hooks.prompt: You are a completion verifier. Check whether the work session completed all required steps. Run 'git diff --name-only HEAD' to see changed files. Check: (1) If any .java/.ts/.tsx source files were changed, verify CHANGELOG.md is also in the diff. If not, return {"ok": false, "reason": "CHANGELOG.md not updated despite source code changes"}. (2) Check the branch name and git log for signs of requirement implementation (GC-* UIDs, issue numbers). If this looks like a requirement implementation, flag if traceability links or status transitions may have been missed. Return {"ok": true} if all checks pass, or {"ok": false, "reason": "..."} with specifics about what is missing.
